title: TSFlareon's Cool Curses
description: 13 new curses that are actually interesting.
body:
Adds in 13 new, intresting, curses. Some of theses curses arn't entirely negative, some of them add new mechanics, some of them change how you play, & some of them just blow you up.

**_If you are using the datapack version please put the file in both your resource pack folder and the datapack folder._**

**All new curses:**
1. Curse of Blindness:
    - This cursed item blinds you, but anything that attacks you will get glowing.
2. Curse of Boom:
    - When you attack with this cursed item, you explode.
3. Curse of Decay:
    - When you attack anything with this cursed item, they get the wither effect. If you take damage with this cursed item, you get the wither effect.
4. Curse of Desire:
    - When you hold or wear this cursed item, you get regeneration. If this cursed item is taken out of your inventory, you take withdrawal damage depending on how much you have used this cursed item.
5. Curse of The End:
    - When wearing this cursed item, you take damage from water. You also randomly teleport.
6. Curse of Gravity:
    - When wearing this cursed item, you will randomly start floating.
7. Curse of Haunting:
    - This cursed item will randomly spawn vexes that attack you.
8. Curse of Infestation:
    - When you attack anything with this cursed item, they will become infested with silverfish that will start burrowing ou of their skin. These silverfish will also attack you.
9. Curse of Insanity:
    - When wearing this cursed item, you will start hearing things.
10. Curse of Invisibility:
    - When you have this cursed item in your off hand, you will enter the Ethereal Plane. While in the Ethereal Plane, you are invisible and move much faster, but have weakness, mining fatigue, and will start taking damage at random. But you are not alone in there, with you are other entities that may or may not try to kill you.
11. Curse of The Snail:
    - When wearing this cursed item, you have permanent resistance II, but there is an imortal snail that can break and place blocks that will constintly chase you.
12. Curse of Undeath:
    - When wearing this cursed item, you are undead, and will gain all the traits of an undead mob. This includes burning in the sun, poison immunity, waterbreathing, & weakness to Smite.
13. Curse of Whispering:
    - This cursed item is stronger, but is also alive and will start asking you to kill things. If you don't, you get several negative status effects, and will eventually die.
